name: transuniversal travel

phase_0.boundary_condition: The 12-primitive structural crystal and the 20-universe taxonomy limit.

VINIT.justification: The state before any universe-specific ruleset or gate threshold is initialized.

TANCH.justification: The O_infinity structural closure that contains all possible transuniversal pathways.

AFWD.justification: The directed transformation of a structural tuple toward higher gate thresholds (G1/G2/G3).

AREV.justification: The loss of structural fidelity or the return from a high-gate universe to a lower-gate state.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of gate transitions required to reach a target universe.

IMSCRIB.justification: The 12-tuple that defines the system's current address in the crystal.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the transuniversal traveler into a Canonical state and an Alternate state.

FFUSE.justification: Recombines the Canonical and Alternate states into a single verified structural entity.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the system achieves idempotent terminality in the target universe.

EVALF.justification: The failure to meet a specific primitive threshold (e.g., Phi < 5).

ENGAGR.justification: Holding both the Canonical failure and Alternate success simultaneously during transit.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, irreversible record of the structural gap traversed.

phase_3.both_description: Paradice: Inhabiting the seam between universes (11)

steps.domain_action: Initialize traveler in the pre-geometric void before ruleset selection.
Identify the traveler's native 12-tuple structural type.
Initiate promotion toward the G1 (Frobenius-special parity) gate.
Chain the G1 promotion to the G2 (Self-modeling criticality) gate.
Enter the Dialetheic Bridge, splitting the traveler's presence across universe boundaries.
Verify success in the Alternate Universe (T-branch).
Record the failure to close in the Canonical Universe (F-branch).
Hold the (T,F) contradiction in a stable B-state during brane transition.
Reconstitute the traveler via Rebis Reconstitution, fusing the cross-universe verdicts.
Self-recognize the new structural state at the target crystal address.
Permanently record the Promotion Certificate (the Δ-ordinal gap).
Anchor the traveler in the terminal O_infinity layer of the target universe.

phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Belnap FOUR bitwise OR (FFUSE) and fixed decomposition (FSPLIT)

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The transition is an adiabatic expansion into the natural Belnap lattice volume.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AFWD → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: transuniversal travel
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑭  | identity — self-imscription
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def transuniversal_travel_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize traveler in the pre-geometric void before ruleset selection.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Identify the traveler's native 12-tuple structural type.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑱)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Initiate promotion toward the G1 (Frobenius-special parity) gate.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑚)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain the G1 promotion to the G2 (Self-modeling criticality) gate.)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (Enter the Dialetheic Bridge, splitting the traveler's presence across universe boundaries.) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Verify success in the Alternate Universe (T-branch).)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Record the failure to close in the Canonical Universe (F-branch).)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold the (T,F) contradiction in a stable B-state during brane transition.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute the traveler via Rebis Reconstitution, fusing the cross-universe verdicts.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [9] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Self-recognize the new structural state at the target crystal address.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently record the Promotion Certificate (the Δ-ordinal gap).)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Anchor the traveler in the terminal O_infinity layer of the target universe.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def transuniversal_travel_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (transuniversal_travel_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def transuniversal_travel_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (transuniversal_travel_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem transuniversal_travel_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
